description: Expected layout for cfa_with_errors: error nodes eps_x1 and eps_x3 must be placed below their terminal targets x_1 and x_3 (placement='below', rank=-1). x_2 carries its own free variance loop so it is NOT detected as an error node and stays at rank 0. F_1 has a fixed self-loop and multiple outgoing paths so it is NOT detected as an error node.
notes: Error nodes with correlated residuals (eps_x1 ↔ eps_x3) must still be detected and placed below rank 0. The correlated-error two-headed path between them is not a self-loop and must not disqualify detection. x_2 has its own free self-loop (direct variance parameterisation without a dedicated error node) — the target-has-self-loop guard in condition 4b must prevent it from being treated as a target of an error node, and x_2 itself must not be mistaken for an error node.
